title: sedum magellense subsp. olympicum
intro: Sedum magellense subsp. olympicum, also known as mountain stonecrop, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Sedum. It is a succulent plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system due to its high levels of antioxidants and other nutrients. Sedum magellense subsp. olympicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is often used to treat skin conditions and wounds, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
